item.title: Response to: The Long Game in Ulcerative Colitis: Mirikizumab's Four-Year Outcomes.

item.title: Ustekinumab resistance in individuals with ulcerative colitis is associated with an alteration of a subset of proinflammatory mucosal regulatory T cells.

item.title: Sphingosine 1-Phosphate (S1P) Receptor Modulators as an Induction and Maintenance Therapy for Moderate to Severe Ulcerative Colitis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.

item.title: Impact of Immunogenicity on Clinical Outcomes in Patients With Moderate-to-Severe Inflammatory Bowel Disease Receiving Subcutaneous Infliximab: A Post Hoc Analysis of the LIBERTY Trials.
item.description: United European gastroenterology journal - RCT - LIBERTY-CD and LIBERTY-UC demonstrated superior efficacy of subcutaneous infliximab (IFX SC) to placebo in patients with Crohn's disease (CD) or ulcerative colitis (UC). Here, we investigated the i...
